headline: Another airline cancels all summer flights from city over fuel costs
summary: With jet fuel prices continuing to sit at highs unseen in years amid the ongoing closure of the Strait of Hormuz, dozens of airlines have reworked their summer schedules to axe flights bringing in insufficient numbers of passengers. Lufthansa recently scrapped 2,000 flights from its schedule ...
